name: Upstash Open Source Program
description: Upstash supports open-source projects with monthly credit grants, direct technical support, and co-marketing opportunities.

perks.title: $1,000 Monthly Credit Grant
perks.description: Covers all Upstash-related costs up to $1,000 per month. Build on any Upstash product(s) including Redis, Kafka, and QStash without worrying about billing.

perks.title: Direct Technical Support
perks.description: Receive direct technical support and help integrating Upstash into your project from the engineering team.

perks.title: Priority Team Access
perks.description: Reach out to Upstash's engineering team and get priority support just like Pro customers.

perks.title: Co-Marketing Opportunities
perks.description: Upstash helps publish technical articles about your business to their audience, providing high-quality backlinks for your project.

eligibility: Must be an open-source project with a recognized OSS license.
Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
applicationProcess: Fill out the application form on the Upstash Open Source Program page.
Provide your name, Twitter/X username, and GitHub repository.
Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
